channel.title: revealjs on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in revealjs on William Fang

item.title: R slidify
item.description: 安装 安装 slidify软件包 library(devtools) install_github('ramnathv/slidify') install_github('ramnathv/slidifyLibraries') Demo 初始化 library(slidify) author('mydeck') slidify("index.Rmd") 格式 上传到 Github # publish to github # create an empty repo on github. replace USER and REPO with your repo details publish(user = 'williamlfang', repo = 'myslidify') # publish to rpubs publish(title = 'My Deck', 'index.html', host = 'rpubs') demo 可以
